en.title: Book of Daniel Prophecies - Apocalyptic Visions, Seventy Weeks & Historical Verification | Full Archive
en.description: Complete archive of prophecies from the Book of Daniel, including Nebuchadnezzar's statue dream, the fiery furnace, writing on the wall, lions' den, four beasts vision, seventy weeks prophecy, kings of north and south, and the final resurrection. The Old Testament's most important apocalyptic literature.
